programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.sub-title: 2025 AFC Divisional Round: Bills vs. Broncos
programme.desc: The Denver Broncos clinched a dramatic 33-30 overtime win to reach the AFC title game, but lost quarterback Bo Nix to a season-ending ankle injury. Broncos kicker Wil Lutz's overtime field goal capped Denver's first playoff win in a decade.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Two second-half touchdowns help the Packers rally against the Cowboys in the 2014 NFC Divisional Round.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Patrick Mahomes and Josh Allen face off in the AFC Divisional Round. During overtime, Mahomes finds Travis Kelce in the corner of the end zone from 8 yards, giving the Chiefs a memorable 42-36 victory.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Chicago Bears quarterback Caleb Williams threw a 46-yard touchdown pass to DJ Moore in overtime, and Chicago overcame a 10-point deficit late in the fourth quarter Saturday night for a 22-16 win over the Green Bay Packers.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Saquon Barkley sets Eagles franchise record with 255 yards rushing, 2 TDs in a 37-20 win over Rams.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Jerome Harrison ran for the third most yards in a single-game in NFL History with 286 yards on the ground as Cleveland wins 41-34 over the Kansas City Chiefs.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: LaDainian Tomlinson found the end zone four times, Philip Rivers threw three touchdown passes as the Chargers came back from a 28-7 halftime deficit to win 49-41 over the Cincinnati Bengals.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: LaDainian Tomlinson found the end zone four times, Philip Rivers threw three touchdown passes as the Chargers came back from a 28-7 halftime deficit to win 49-41 over the Cincinnati Bengals.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Lamar Jackson had 3 fourth-quarter TD passes, and the Ravens stopped the Bengals on a 2-point conversion with 38 seconds remaining to hold them 35-34 on Thursday night. The Ravens rallied from a 21-7 third-quarter deficit.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Lamar Jackson had 3 fourth-quarter TD passes, and the Ravens stopped the Bengals on a 2-point conversion with 38 seconds remaining to hold them 35-34 on Thursday night. The Ravens rallied from a 21-7 third-quarter deficit.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Younghoe Koo's 52-yard field goal as time expired in regulation forced overtime, and Cousins took care of the rest as he set a franchise record with 509 passing yards to lift Atlanta (3-2) into a tie atop the division.

programme.title: 3 Keys to Every Shot
programme.desc: Chris uses his expertise to break down some of the most difficult shots in golf into three simple keys.

programme.title: 3 Keys to Every Shot
programme.desc: Nick Dougherty analyzes the swings of Rory McIlroy, Collin Morikawa and Jon Rahm to teach the three keys to a variety of challenging golf shots.

programme.title: 3 Keys to Every Shot
programme.desc: Learn how to hit shots into the wind, hit low fades with irons and dial in distance on awkward 50-yard pitch shots.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: The 2018 European Ryder Cup captain Thomas Bjorn offers up his best wedge, iron and driver instruction. Bjorn, a 21-time winner worldwide, showcases how narrowing his focus on his wedges allows him to hit quality shots closer to the green.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Thomas Bjorn, 2018 European Ryder Cup captain, shares his best short game and bunker instruction. With 21 victories worldwide, Bjorn discusses how improved contact above all else allows him to score well around the greens.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: With 21 worldwide victories, Thomas Bjorn joins Todd Lewis and offers up his best putting advice and instruction. Bjorn highlights his new unique grip that can help anyone with putting yips.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Let Fred Funk teach you how to handle your driver.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Fred Funk talks his fundamental approach to his setup and how hybrids saved his game late in his career.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Let legendary golfer Fred Funk teach you how to improve your short game and putting.

programme.title: Golf Channel Games
programme.desc: GolfPass brings you thousands of lessons from the game's best instructors, original series, news, features and more.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Masters champion Sandy Lyle breaks down all things full swing and shows how his compact, but powerful swing has been so consistent through the years. Lyle shares how to maximize distance with every club.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: World Golf Hall of Fame inductee Sandy Lyle shows how to handle difficult lies with minor technique adjustments and gives great advice on attacking tough pins. Lyle also talks about his new putting method that has helped as he has gotten older.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.sub-title: Sandy Lyle - Shots You Need to Practice
programme.desc: Sandy Lyle reveals how to hit a successful shot out of a divot and from under a tree. The 1985 Open Champion also teaches how to control trajectory in windy conditions.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Laura Davies shares insights and secrets on how to grip it and rip it. Laura talks about her career and how the driver was an instrumental club to her success.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Laura Davies shares her insights on her iron game. Laura talks how consistent ball striking was instrumental to her success.

programme.title: On Tour/On Course
programme.desc: Comic Jim Jefferies is in Las Vegas and goes to Lisa Vanderpump's restaurant, the Pinball Hall of Fame, and tees it up with Forrest Shaw, Amos Gill and Scot Armstrong at the Revere Golf Club.

programme.title: On Tour/On Course
programme.desc: Comics Ron White, Chris Voth and Pat McCollum play Driftwood Golf and Ranch Club in Austin, Texas; after the bus breaks down, the team has to pivot to Cleveland to show Ron's life on the road and stand-up comedy career.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: With multiple wins on the APGA Tour, Kamaiu Johnson joins Bones on the course to share his tips and strategies for optimum success. Kamaiu tackles the "hardest shot in golf" where he gives expert advice for all handicap levels.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: 5-Time PGA Tour winner Kevin Na joins Bones on the course to share his tips and strategies that have led to his professional success.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: U.S. Women's Open runner-up Mina Harigae goes in depth on her pre-shot routine and gives great examples of key targets she focuses on every shot.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Multiple DP World Tour winner and Sky Sports analyst Nick Dougherty joins Bones for a special episode from the 150th Open Championship at St. Andrews Golf Links to break down some of the iconic holes at the most storied venue in golf.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: PGA Tour standout Sam Ryder joins Bones on the course to share his tips and strategies that have led to his growing success.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: Solheim Cup veteran Mel Reid joins Jim "Bones" Mackay on the course and goes in depth on her strategies to shoot low. Reid shares her insights on pin placement and tee shot placement. Plus, she gives green reading and lag putting tips.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: PGA TOUR winner Lanto Griffin tees it up at TPC Sawgrass to share on-course strategies on some iconic holes. Plus, he goes in-depth on his green reading and putting process.

programme.title: Playing Lessons
programme.desc: 2018 NCAA Division I champion and current LPGA player Haley Moore shares the tips and strategies that have helped her succeed. Moore goes in depth on her green reading process and gives tips on how to adjust for uphill and downhill lies in the rough.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Key parts of the swing golfers should copy from the best players in the world; a backswing move used by Sam Burns; a drill to add distance like Xander Schauffele; a footwork tip that helped Scottie Scheffler.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: How to increase club head speed, ball speed, and other key areas where speed is needed for more distance. Martin Hall brings in one of the worldwide leaders in golf biomechanics for a cutting-edge lesson on practicing at the correct speed.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal take the fear out of golf's scariest shots. Learn drills to avoid the dreaded shank, tips on how to hit the ball out of a divot, and advice from Butch Harmon on escaping tree trouble.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach what to take away from the best players and shots in golf this year. How to play approach shots from deep rough, side hill lies and fairway bunkers. Martin also reveals the book that every golfer should be reading.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.
